title: Exact Finite Simplicial Cup Product Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite simplicial cup product QF_BV/DRAT regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Finite replay computes a 1-bit F2 cup-product value as alpha_ab AND beta_bc, while the malformed row claims the opposite bit.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional cup-product rows only when they add distinct associativity, graded-commutativity, cohomology-ring, or proof-reconstruction pressure; keep general cohomology-ring theory in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Rows state the finite complex, coefficient field, cochain basis, cup-product split convention, and listed product values.
The validator recomputes finite F2 cup products and the finite coboundary Leibniz row exactly.
Malformed fixed rows link source artifacts and route regressions before claiming checked QF_BV/DRAT evidence.
Associativity, graded commutativity, cup products on arbitrary complexes, cohomology rings, and topological invariance remain Lean-horizon until kernel-checked proof routes exist.
